introSection: Jurassic River is a steel water roller coaster located at Cavallino Matto in Castagneto Carducci, Tuscany, Italy.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged inline in 4 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Jurassic River is a steel water roller coaster located at Cavallino Matto in Castagneto Carducci, Tuscany, Italy.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged inline in 4 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.
